_instructions: HOW TO ADD A PROMO / NEWS POST:  1) Put the image file in this folder (docs/assets/promos/).  2) Add an entry to the 'promos' list below.  Fields: title (text), type ('product' | 'store' | 'news'), image (filename in this folder e.g. 'mypromo.jpg', OR a full https:// URL), date ('YYYY-MM-DD'), text (description), cta (optional button label). Newest dates show first. Delete the sample entries once you add your own.

promos.title: ₱500 OFF Selected Smartphones
promos.text: Grab ₱500 off on selected Infinix, Realme and Xiaomi units this month. Limited stocks available — message us to reserve yours today!

promos.title: Grand Opening Weekend Sale
promos.text: Celebrate with us! Enjoy freebies on every accessory purchase and free screen protector installation all weekend long at D&G Tech & Load.

promos.title: Now Offering GCash Cash-In / Cash-Out
promos.text: Great news! D&G Tech & Load now handles GCash cash-in and cash-out, plus E-Load for all networks and SIM registration assistance. Drop by anytime!
